creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have an error when I launch gvim :


Error detected while processing function l9#guardScriptLoading:

line    7:
E15: Invalid expression:
E15: Invalid expression: a:l9Version > 0 && (a:l9Version > s:L9_VERSION_CURRENT
||
E15: Invalid expression:
E15: Invalid expression: a:l9Version > 0 && (a:l9Version > s:L9_VERSION_CURRENT
||
line    8:
E10: \ should be followed by /, ? or &
Error detected while processing /usr/local/share/vim/vim74/menu.vim:
line  122:
E329: No menu "&Print"%    



Also, I can have all menus and buttons (GTK2) if my locale is en_US instead of fr_FR or de_DE (with or without NLS option).
